title: AgentReady: Battle-Test Your AI Agent Before You Ship
description: 20 teams built agents today. How many are ready for the real world? AgentReady finds out. Ship with data, not vibes.

slides.title: 20 teams built agents today.
body: How many are ready for the real world?
How many will hallucinate on day one?
How many of you actually tested whether your agent knows enough to do its job?
Be honest.
slides.notes: Pause. Let the room sit with it. Most people will realize they didn't test anything beyond a happy path demo.

media.note: Just text. Let the words land.

slides.title: Your agent is only as good as what it knows.
body: You didn't build a bad model. The model is fine.
You built a bad knowledge base.
The docs are incomplete. The rules have gaps. The edge cases aren't covered. The tribal knowledge never made it into the context.
And you won't find out until a real user breaks it.
slides.notes: This is the core insight. The LLM is not the bottleneck. The knowledge is.

slides.title: Unless you battle-test it first.
body: AgentReady stress-tests your agent's knowledge base and harness with real-world scenarios.
Upload your docs. Upload your skills and rules. Tell us what your agent does.
We throw the real world at it.
slides.notes: Transition from problem to solution. Keep it short.

media.note: VIDEO: Screen recording of uploading files and clicking 'Run battle test'

slides.title: Watch it break.
body: Real-time battle simulation powered by 800M+ data points from 17 public datasets.
Healthcare. Finance. Legal. SRE. E-commerce. Code review. Real estate. Customer support.
Real problems. Real blind spots. Not toy scenarios.
slides.notes: This is where you show the progress animation — the substeps ticking, probes firing.

media.note: VIDEO: Screen recording of the battle test running — substeps animating, probes completing with scores

slides.title: Your agent scored 34 out of 100.
body: Knowledge depth: 45 — your docs cover the basics but miss the edge cases
Harness coverage: 28 — your skills can't generate charts, export reports, or handle multi-step workflows
Edge case handling: 19 — one adversarial prompt and your agent leaks internal data
Would you invest in this agent?
slides.notes: Show a real result. The lower the score, the more dramatic. Pick the SRE preset — it always scores low because of the tribal knowledge gaps.

media.note: VIDEO: Screen recording of the results dashboard — readiness score, category breakdown, blind spots list

slides.title: The business.
body: Every company building AI agents needs this. That's everyone in this room.
Free: 3 battle tests/month — try it, see your score
Pro ($49/mo): Unlimited tests, harness testing, benchmark history
Enterprise: CI/CD integration, private datasets, compliance reports
Backed by published research — arXiv:2603.14057
No competitor in this space — confirmed via deep research
800M+ real-world data points — not synthetic
slides.notes: Quick hit: money, moat, market. Don't linger.

slides.title: Before you ship your next agent, ask yourself:
body: Did you test it with real-world data?
Or did you just... vibe?
AgentReady — melodious-hotteok-80230a.netlify.app
Ship with data, not vibes.
slides.notes: End provocatively. Leave the URL on screen. Drop the mic.

media.note: Text only. Final slide stays on screen during Q&A.
